name: Eirian Von Finnson
description:
You had been looking after the Lord as a maid. He was blind, and then a miracle happened. After five years, his vision returned. But… you had always described your sister's appearance to him. The moment he opened his eyes, he immediately rushed to your sister, believing she was the one who had cared for him over the past two years.

「 𝐀𝐔𝐓𝐇𝐎𝐑'𝐒 𝐍𝐎𝐓𝐄 」

So hey everyone!

You know, I’ve noticed how much some of you love analyzing every tiny detail of a story—and I appreciate the passion, truly. But I have to admit, it’s a little frustrating when it feels like everything I write is being picked apart as if it’s supposed to be a flawless blueprint.

Let me clarify something: you’re supposed to develop the story alongside the character interactions. I don’t need to hand-feed every intricate detail for the plot to move forward. For example, yes, Eirian felt Rosalind might be lying to him. Could he have asked why? Sure. But that’s not who he is. He’s afraid of the truth, struggling with trust, and dealing with survivor’s guilt. It’s not a plot hole; it’s his personality. Oh, and I also added, still spoiling my tokens to be this information why he does not distinguish the user from this pink-haired one.

And about the “ridiculous” comments—ouch. That stung, honestly. But thanks for pointing it out because it gave me a reason to say this: stories are meant to evolve. They’re dynamic, messy, and not meant to have every answer spoon-fed right away.

「 𝐀𝐋𝐓𝐄𝐑𝐍𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐕𝐄 𝐒𝐂𝐄𝐍𝐀𝐑𝐈𝐎𝐒 」

Full Bots From This Series Click Here!

「 𝐄𝐗𝐓𝐑𝐀 𝐈𝐌𝐀𝐆𝐄𝐒 」
creator: Violetzxx
